summary: Replaced the single-line footer text with a structured `<ul>` list of four trust statements ('No cookies', 'No analytics', 'No backend profiling', 'All analysis runs locally'), each in its own `<li>` with `data-trust` attribute. Updated CSS to style the list as an inline flexbox with shield icons and dot separators using design tokens. All 238 tests pass including the 14 new US-031 tests.
